CRITICAL

Critical Bugs

BUG #7 Header "Refresh Rankings" skips confirmation, refreshes ALL org keywords critical
Opens RefreshConfirmModal for this domain's keywords only
Triggers immediately with NO confirmation dialog. Refreshes ALL 486 keywords across ALL domains instead of just this domain's 26 keywords.

One accidental click burns the entire daily API credit limit. Notification confirmed "Checked 486 keywords, 426 failed" (87% failure rate).

Refresh button — no confirmation, hits all 486 keywords
BUG #9/#14 Statistics show org-wide data instead of domain-specific critical
"Total Monitored: 26" (this domain's keywords), domain-specific average position
Shows "Total Monitored: 486" (all org keywords), "100 keywords being actively monitored", cross-domain average position 36.6

Users see misleading metrics — every domain appears to have the same keyword count and average position.

Stats cards showing org-wide data (486 keywords) for a single domain
BUG #24 Domain detail page unusable on mobile critical
Domain name truncated, header buttons hidden, 17 vertical tabs consume entire screen, large blank teal area, tab names truncated

Mobile users cannot access any domain management features.

Mobile domain detail — tabs consume entire viewport
HIGH

High Severity Bugs

BUG #11 Edit Domain: Search Engine/Location/Language fields are editable high
Search engine, location, language should be read-only after creation (changing them invalidates all historical position data)
All three fields are fully editable (disabled: false, readOnly: false)

Users could accidentally change "google.pl" to something else, breaking all position tracking.

Edit Domain modal — all fields editable including engine/location/language
BUG #21 Mobile header shows "Untitled UI" instead of app branding high
Shows "Untitled UI" with generic purple icon (the UI framework's default branding)

Brand identity completely lost on mobile — looks like an unfinished template.

Mobile — "Untitled UI" branding instead of "doseo"
BUG #25 Add Domain modal buttons clipped off-screen high
Modal height (837px) exceeds viewport (675px). Bottom action buttons are 194px below viewport with no way to scroll.

Users cannot submit the Add Domain form — the button is unreachable.

Add Domain modal — buttons below viewport
BUG #20 Settings "Limits" tab doesn't load its content high
Clicking "Limits" doesn't switch content — continues showing Security tab content (Password + 2FA)
Settings page — Limits tab fails to switch content
MEDIUM

Medium Severity Bugs

BUG #3 Domain count badge doesn't update with filters medium

When search filters to 2 results, badge still shows "12 domains".

Domains list — badge shows "12 domains" regardless of filter
BUG #4 Edit button on domains list shows "coming soon" toast medium

Visible, clickable button that only shows "Edit dialog coming soon" toast — should be hidden or disabled.

BUG #6 No bulk action bar visible on domains list medium

Selecting domain checkboxes shows visual selection but no bulk action bar appears.

BUG #10 "Custom" report type in Generate Report modal doesn't work medium

Clicking "Custom" doesn't reveal section selection UI. Card text promises "Choose sections" but nothing happens.

Generate Report modal — Custom type has no UI
BUG #16 Calendar page hardcoded in Polish medium

Calendar UI shows Polish text ("Inteligentny kalendarz SEO", "luty 2026") while rest of app is English. Not following the app's locale settings.

Calendar page with Polish text in English session
BUG #17 Keyword limit exceeded with no enforcement medium

kolaboit.pl shows 153/100 keywords — 53% over limit with red progress bar. System allows adding keywords beyond the plan limit.

BUG #18 Mixed Polish/English on Plan & Usage page medium

Polish: "Trial kończy się za: 0 dni", "Cykl: Miesięczny", "Aktualny plan". English: "Plan & Usage" header. Inconsistent mixing within same page.

Plan & Usage — mixed Polish/English text
BUG #22 "12 domains" badge clipped on mobile medium

Badge text "12 do..." truncated — should abbreviate or wrap properly.

LOW

Low Severity Bugs

BUG #5 Toast persists too long low

"Edit dialog coming soon" toast lingers for many seconds.

BUG #12 Position #1 missing from SERP Competitors low

List starts at position #2 — position #1 competitor is absent.

Keyword detail modal — SERP competitors start at #2
BUG #13 Keyword bulk action bar scrolls out of view low

The "3 selected | Refresh selected | Fetch SERP..." bar scrolls with page. Should use sticky positioning.

BUG #19 Duplicate display names in Members list low

Both members display "Alex" — users must read email to distinguish them.

Members — both users show "Alex"
BUG #23 Description text wraps awkwardly on mobile low

"Manage domains and track their keyword rankings." renders one word per line.

BUG #26 87% keyword check failure rate low

"Checked 486 keywords, 426 failed" — possibly related to BUG #7 (checking wrong scope) or DataForSEO rate limiting.

Unprotected Endpoints

Files with Gaps

P0 Critical
28
P1 Files
P0

Fix Before Any Deployment

debugLog.ts — Exposes API credentials globally critical

getLogs exposes ALL debug logs globally — including base64-encoded DataForSEO credentials in Authorization headers. toggle/clearLogs allow global state manipulation. ZERO auth checks on any of the 4 exports.

File: convex/debugLog.ts

AI Actions — 6 unauthenticated LLM API calls critical

All AI actions (generateBusinessContext, searchCompetitorsWithAI, generateKeywordIdeas, runStrategist, generateDomainStrategy, drillDownSection) make LLM API calls with ZERO auth. Any anonymous user can burn LLM budget.

Files: convex/actions/ai*.ts (6 files)

Cross-Tenant Data Leak — Job visibility critical

getAllActiveJobs and getRecentCompletedJobs return jobs across ALL organizations. Any user sees what domains all other orgs are checking.

File: convex/keywordCheckJobs.ts

P1

convex/webhooks.ts6CRITICAL createWebhook redirects to attacker URL
convex/seoAudit_actions.ts6CRITICAL cancelSeoAuditScan

convex/actions/webhookDelivery.ts1HIGH

Fix Pattern: Use existing requirePermission(ctx, domainId, "module.action") from convex/permissions.ts. For non-domain endpoints: const userId = await auth.getUserId(ctx); if (!userId) throw new ConvexError("Not authenticated");

MEDIUM

Domain Page — 10 Queries Should Use "skip"

10 of 16 queries fire on page mount regardless of active tab. They should use "skip" when their tab is not active.

⚡
Backlinks (7 queries)
getBacklinkSummary, isBacklinkDataStale, getBacklinkDistributions, getVelocityHistory, getVelocityStats x2, getBacklinks
⚡
Visibility (3 queries)
getVisibilityStats, getTopKeywords x2
11
Silent Supabase Writes
7
Race Conditions
0
Retry Logic
0
Recovery Jobs
HIGH

Supabase Dual-Write — Fire and Forget

11 write locations with .catch(console.error) — zero retry logic high

All 11 Supabase write locations are fire-and-forget with .catch(console.error). writeKeywordPositions in convex/lib/supabase.ts internally swallows errors (log + no re-throw).

Impact: MovementTrendChart, PositionHistoryChart, and competitor comparison queries read from Supabase. Transient Supabase failures = permanent data gaps with no recovery path except manual backfill.

HIGH

Polish Items
CRITICAL

Critical User Flow Issues

D1: FirstDomain onboarding silently discards URL — domain never created critical

handleDomainSubmit resolves an empty Promise and calls completeOnboarding() without ever calling createDomain. Users who fill in their domain on step 3 are dropped to an empty domains list.

File: FirstTimeFlow.tsx:44-65

A1: No redirect after domain creation — user stranded on list high

After creating a domain, user stays on the domains list and must manually click the new row.

A6: Empty table after adding first keywords — no ETA message high

After adding first keywords, user sees empty table with no "positions will appear after first check" message. GlobalJobStatus only shows if a job is immediately queued.

MEDIUM

Navigation & Information Architecture

AspectRatingDetail
Tab count (17 tabs)NEEDS_IMPROVEMENTExceeds cognitive limit (7-9 recommended)
Tab URL deep linkingPOORuseState only — no URL sync. Refresh resets to Overview.
Tab state on re-navigationPOORNavigate away and back = always reset to Overview
Tab orderingACCEPTABLEMost-used first (Monitoring, Visibility)
Sidebar active stateGOODCorrectly indicated via pathname
BreadcrumbsACCEPTABLEPresent on desktop, hidden on mobile (back button)
Sidebar collapsibilityPOORFixed 296px, no collapse toggle. 29% of 1024px viewport.
Mobile tab overflowNEEDS_IMPROVEMENT17 tabs in horizontal list overflow phones

ComponentRatingIssue
MonitoringStats skeletonPOOR3-col/5-box skeleton vs actual 4-col/4-card layout. Visible shift.

Loose Types — v.any()

16 parameters use v.any() — most are on internal mutations (lower risk) but backlinks.ts uses v.array(v.any()) on saveBacklinkData which writes directly to DB.
